standard_version.description: Installed standard version this configuration targets, for example 2026.7.18.

kind.description: Audit boundary kind. Omitted kind defaults to package.

profile.description: Primary project profile such as python-package, python-native-wasm, cpp-library, csharp-app, javascript-web-app, python-js-app, typescript-web-app, python-ts-app, rust-app, rust-firmware, or zephyr-firmware.

enabled_scopes.description: Default audit scopes to run when the CLI call does not pass --scope. Workspace configs must not declare enabled_scopes.

workspace.description: Explicit member list for kind='workspace' audit aggregation.

members.description: Relative package/application roots that each contain their own dev-std config marker.

artifact_policy.description: Whether dist/ is transient packaging output or committed grouped runtime artifacts.

governance.description: Governance catalog path and generated HTML output overrides.

artifacts.description: Relative path to artifact governance catalog. Defaults to docs/governance/artifacts.toml.

vendors.description: Relative path to vendored-code governance catalog. Defaults to docs/governance/vendors.toml.

release.description: Relative path to release-channel governance catalog. Defaults to docs/governance/release.toml.

output.description: Relative path to generated governance HTML output. Defaults to docs/generated/governance.

roots.description: Registered test roots containing rack.toml. Defaults are not inferred for strict test governance.

signoff_strata.description: Rack strata that serve as release signoff gates. Defaults to L99_signoff when omitted.

typescript.description: TypeScript profile audit configuration, migration metadata, and documented exceptions.

config.description: Relative path to the audited TypeScript typecheck config. Defaults to tsconfig.json.

migration.description: Temporary migration metadata for TypeScript profiles that still carry owned JavaScript.

allow_js.description: Whether allowJs and owned JavaScript source are temporarily accepted.

tracking_ref.description: Local plan/design path or external issue ref that tracks the JavaScript-to-TypeScript migration.

remove_when.description: Concrete condition that triggers removing the migration allowance.

exceptions.description: Documented exceptions for TypeScript guardrails that cannot be audited locally.

package_extends.description: Local document, plan ref, or external issue that reviews a package-based tsconfig extends value.

skip_lib_check.description: Local document, plan ref, or external issue that reviews skipLibCheck=true.

rust.description: Rust profile audit configuration, embedded metadata, and documented exceptions.

source_root.description: Relative Rust-owned source root. Defaults to src; polyglot repositories commonly use src/rs or src/rust.

firmware.description: Embedded Rust firmware metadata for rust-firmware audits.

target.description: Rust target triple or project-relative custom target JSON path.

no_std_ref.description: Local documentation path for no_std firmware intent.

panic_ref.description: Local documentation path for panic behavior.

allocator_ref.description: Local documentation path for allocator or no-allocation policy.

hardware_ref.description: Local documentation path for hardware setup, flashing, debug, and release-test policy.

memory_layout.description: Project-relative memory or linker artifact such as memory.x or a link.x provider.

runner.description: Project-relative runner/flashing config such as Embed.toml, probe-rs metadata, cargo-embed setup, or a wrapper.

exceptions.description: Documented exceptions for Rust guardrails that require human review.

ambient_toolchain.description: Local document, plan ref, or external issue that explains why rust-toolchain.toml is omitted.

unsafe.description: Local document, plan ref, or external issue that reviews an unsafe-code boundary.

standard_docs.description: Canonical standard design-doc paths by language or profile family.

javascript.description: Canonical JavaScript standard design doc path. Defaults accept docs/design/javascript-standard.html or docs/design/standards/javascript.html.

typescript.description: Canonical TypeScript standard design doc path. Defaults accept docs/design/typescript-standard.html or docs/design/standards/typescript.html.

rust.description: Canonical Rust standard design doc path. Defaults accept docs/design/rust-standard.html or docs/design/standards/rust.html.

output.description: Legacy-compatible generated governance HTML output path. [governance.html].output takes precedence when both are present.

roots.description: Configured active plan roots. Defaults to docs/plans.

ignore.description: Project-relative legacy plan/log-like files or directories to ignore during migration. Configured plan roots remain strict.

manifest_path.description: Relative path to a command manifest. Defaults to docs/contracts/command_manifest.a0.json when present. Legacy v0 manifests must be configured explicitly during migration.

enforced_statuses.description: Command statuses enforced by docs.cli. Defaults to public, experimental, and deprecated.

inventory_provider.description: Deterministic parser/help inventory provider for command parity.

function.description: Zero-argument function returning argparse.ArgumentParser for kind=python_parser.

path.description: Static inventory JSON path for kind=static_json.

max_depth.description: Maximum parser command path depth to compare.

compatibility_pruning.description: Configurable scan for retired compatibility surfaces that must stay removed.

root.description: Relative scan root. Defaults to the audited project root.

forbidden_patterns.description: Regular expressions that must not appear in scanned paths.

excluded_parts.description: Additional path parts to exclude from the compatibility scan.

excluded_paths.description: Additional project-relative file paths to exclude from the compatibility scan.

excluded_names.description: Additional filenames to exclude from the compatibility scan.

suffixes.description: File suffixes to scan instead of the default text suffix set.

names.description: Exact filenames to scan instead of the default text filename set.

pr_hygiene.description: Opt-in public GitHub pull-request hygiene policy.

enabled.description: Whether wn-dev-std check validates the public PR hygiene workflow.

workflow.description: Relative path to the GitHub PR hygiene workflow. Defaults to .github/workflows/pr-hygiene.yml.

pull_request_template.description: Relative path to the PR template. Defaults to .github/pull_request_template.md.

require_pull_request_template.description: Whether the local check requires a PR template with Linked issue guidance.
